theme_and_archetype.archetype: Soft Utility mixed with Swiss Clarity
theme_and_archetype.description: A premium, calming, and highly readable aesthetic designed to build trust for elderly users and caregivers. Focuses on soft blue gradients, deep navy for high-contrast legibility, and energetic lime green for primary actions.

guidelines: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight).
Do not use default system fonts like Inter or Roboto.
Ensure contrast ratio is greater than 4.5:1 for elderly readability.
Oversized hero typography must maintain a 2-step tailwind jump to subtitles.

glass_card.classes: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/50 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(15,23,42,0.04)] rounded-3xl p-6 md:p-8 transition-all duration-300

floating_chip.classes: inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/60 shadow-sm rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold text-slate-800

cta_button.classes: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-[#CCFF00] text-[#0F172A] font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-lg shadow-[0_8px_20px_rgba(204,255,0,0.3)] transition-all duration-300

sos_button.classes: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-red-500 text-white font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-xl shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(239,68,68,0.4)] animate-pulse

icon_wrapper.classes: h-14 w-14 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-white to-slate-50 flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm border border-white

motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up for dashboard widgets and landing page features.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift up (-translate-y-1) and shadows intensify.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Soft scaling on buttons, smooth background color transitions.

images.guidelines: Use warm, authentic photography of Indian elderly and caregivers. For medical icons, use high-quality 3D renders or sleek abstract geometries. Avoid clinical, cold imagery.

elements: Hero section with soft blue gradient background and floating glassmorphism stat chips (e.g., '24/7 AI Guidance', 'Daily Voice Summary').
Large oversized H1 heading.
Lime green CTA 'Get Fittyfit'.
Feature bento grid showcasing 3D medical abstract imagery and caregiver photos.
Testimonials using glass cards.

dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid Mode B, but spaced generously
elements: Greeting 'Good Morning, [Name]' with date and weather.
Today's Summary Card (span 2 cols) with key metrics.
Upcoming Medicines List with checkmarks.
Quick Action grid (Ask AI, Voice Summary, Food Analysis).
Floating SOS button fixed at bottom-right.
Cultural/Seasonal tips widget.
Photo upload area with dashed border and glass bg.
Result card: Safe/Limit/Avoid badge (Green/Yellow/Red).
Alternatives suggestions list.
Medicine interaction warnings with subtle red/orange accents.
Large Play Button with audio wave animation.
'Call Me Now' and 'Schedule Daily Call' actions.
Language selection dropdown (Hindi/English).
Sample Hindi summary transcription card.
Massive red SOS pulse button.
Emergency contact numbers.
Quick display of Blood Group, current meds, and location.
